beaufort_scale.name: Light Air
beaufort_scale.sea: Ripples with the appearance of scales; no foam crests.
beaufort_scale.land: Direction of wind shown by smoke drift.

beaufort_scale.name: Light Breeze
beaufort_scale.sea: Small wavelets; crests have a glassy appearance.
beaufort_scale.land: Wind felt on face; leaves rustle.

beaufort_scale.name: Gentle Breeze
beaufort_scale.sea: Large wavelets; crests begin to break.
beaufort_scale.land: Leaves and small twigs in constant motion.

beaufort_scale.name: Moderate Breeze
beaufort_scale.sea: Small waves; fairly frequent white horses.
beaufort_scale.land: Raises dust and loose paper; small branches moved.

beaufort_scale.name: Fresh Breeze
beaufort_scale.land: Small trees in leaf begin to sway.

beaufort_scale.name: Strong Breeze
beaufort_scale.sea: Large waves; white foam crests everywhere.
beaufort_scale.land: Large branches in motion; whistling in wires.

beaufort_scale.name: Near Gale
beaufort_scale.sea: Sea heaps up; white foam blown in streaks.
beaufort_scale.land: Whole trees in motion; hard to walk against wind.

beaufort_scale.name: Gale
beaufort_scale.sea: High waves; crests break into spindrift.
beaufort_scale.land: Breaks twigs off trees; impedes progress.

beaufort_scale.name: Severe Gale
beaufort_scale.sea: High waves; dense foam; visibility affected.

beaufort_scale.name: Storm
beaufort_scale.sea: Very high waves; sea surface white.

beaufort_scale.name: Hurricane
beaufort_scale.sea: Air filled with foam and spray.

glossary.definition: The energy transport rate. < 10 (Weak) is ripple-like; 10-40 (Clean) is good for carving; > 40 (Heavy) is powerful surf.
Time between crests. > 8s is organized swell; < 5s is messy wind-chop.
How the wind hits the shore. Side-shore is usually best for windsurfing waves; On-shore is safer but choppier.
Occur twice a month when the moon is full or new. Expect higher highs, lower lows, and much stronger currents.
Occur during the moon's quarter phases. The difference between high and low tide is at its smallest, resulting in mellow water movement.
